sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa phat un, A aw ka thei.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A aw ka thei, Honpa’ aw hi;
Hun simin kei hong hoph hi,
A aw ka thei Topa phat

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A mel ka muh loh hangin ah,
Huihpi lak pan A aw ka za;
Ni hong tangin nuam pah silsial.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Van innpi thu zong hong gen hi.
